sourceFamilyRoles.reviewerRole: macro data definition and release-reading boundary
macro data definition and release-reading boundary
metadata or source-boundary reference only until reviewer confirms direct fit

operatingRules: Use this prompt before creating or filling the real status overlay.
Start with the high-risk lesson in each batch.
Write real reviewer notes only after source-fit, fact-check, boundary, copying-risk, and original-rewrite checks are actually performed.
Keep approvalStatus:not_approved, learnerFacingRelease:false, productionReady:false, and currentGrade:structural_draft.
Do not paste source body text into notes or lesson prose.

lessonPrompts.firstDecision: Use the batch high-risk decision as context, then write targeted source-fit notes.

notePrompts.prompt: Resolve this after the batch high-risk lesson is reviewed. State how the lesson should be rewritten as original education prose or observation practice, without copying source body text.
notePrompts.passCriteria: Names the intended rewrite angle and keeps the lesson structural_draft.

notePrompts.prompt: Classify each source family as direct evidence, boundary-only context, historical-language context, macro/data context, or unsuitable for explanatory prose.
notePrompts.passCriteria: Separates direct source fit from boundary-only metadata and names any sources to keep out of lesson prose.

notePrompts.prompt: List which claims can be fact-checked from the source metadata and which claims must be removed or left unresolved.
notePrompts.passCriteria: Does not invent facts and does not rely on yellow/red/research-only evidence.

notePrompts.prompt: Confirm the rewrite contains no advice, signal, performance claim, broker/order workflow, automation, or real-money guidance.
notePrompts.passCriteria: Explicitly states that the lesson remains education-only and non-production.

notePrompts.prompt: Confirm no external source body text will be copied; sources may guide boundaries, citations, and original rewrite decisions only.
notePrompts.passCriteria: Mentions no-copy and no source-body reuse.

notePrompts.prompt: Add the human reviewer's initials only after real review work is performed.
notePrompts.passCriteria: Not filled by generated examples or automation.

sourceRefsToInspect.name: CFTC AI Trading Bots Advisory
sourceRefsToInspect.allowedUse: Use metadata, source refs, taxonomy, glossary seeds, source-boundary notes, and original lesson-rewrite evidence. Cite the agency and access date; spot-check embedded third-party material before quoting.
sourceRefsToInspect.disallowedUse: Do not copy agency logos, photos, third-party inserts, market data beyond source terms, or imply agency endorsement. Do not convert education pages into trading advice, signals, or real-money instructions.

boundary: This prompt is reviewer-facing scaffolding only. It does not create real reviewer notes, approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, change grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, or guide real-money decisions.
